name: ticktock
description: Inline timestamps and per-turn deltas for Claude Code transcripts. Shows wall-clock time on every prompt and response, idle duration between events, response durations, subagent timing, and an optional session recap.

time_format.title: Time format
time_format.description: strftime format for the wall-clock timestamp on each line. Examples: %H:%M:%S (default), %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S, %l:%M %p.

idle_label.title: Idle label
idle_label.description: Label for the 'time since last response' delta.

session_label.title: Session label
session_label.description: Label for the session-elapsed suffix (only shown when Show session elapsed is on).

recap_label.title: Recap label
recap_label.description: Prefix for the session-recap line emitted on session end.

show_deltas.title: Show deltas
show_deltas.description: Show per-event delta (idle/took) on prompt and response lines.

show_session.title: Show session elapsed
show_session.description: Append session-elapsed time to every prompt and response line.

show_turn.title: Show turn counter
show_turn.description: Prefix prompt and response lines with a per-session turn counter (#1, #2, ...).

log_history.title: Log event history
log_history.description: Append every event as a JSON line to a monthly history log in the plugin data dir.

recap_min_turns.title: Recap threshold (turns)
recap_min_turns.description: Only emit the session recap when the session had at least this many turns.

log_months.title: History retention (months)
log_months.description: Delete history-YYYY-MM.jsonl files older than this many months. 0 disables pruning.

sanity_cap.title: Sanity cap (seconds)
sanity_cap.description: Suppress any delta larger than this many seconds (guards against stale state from crashed sessions). 86400 = 24h.

cleanup_days.title: State cleanup (days)
cleanup_days.description: Delete per-session state files older than this many days. 0 disables cleanup.
